textByHashes.4ce7ac331d7713ebd9d8c8104ef8a78490ba1f85: I am on my return journey from the dark lands of Morytania. It would be remiss of me not to stop and take in the glory of Paterdomus before my return to Entrana.
textByHashes.75cb2438373ef5051e15e89ae5aacfe784dc6b16: Indeed, but as a faithful servant of Saradomin, it is my duty to confront the taint of Zamorak, wherever it may be found. Violence is to be abhorred, but at times it is an unfortunate necessity.
textByHashes.f10745bd21661e2895349d87d19b7f613346040b: Before you depart, adventurer, I was wondering if you might be interested in helping me with something?
textByHashes.7f28bd9bec12910b49f24d2b8c82b879e71aaa55: Did you reconsider my request? I'd be very grateful if you'd be able to help me with something.
textByHashes.bfc185b516dd4a23eff643b6f1ec048661a34904: On my travels in Morytania, I encountered an individual from the lands to the far east. He spoke of a weapon from his homeland that I think would be very valuable in our fight against the darkness.
textByHashes.d72c47b9badf38d2c57bea2fdd29934429510e62: If you could help me build one of these weapons, you would be highly rewarded by the Church of Saradomin.
textByHashes.27cfeadb78dc00a986f19e1119bb796829744bbe: Yes, now pay attention. I need you to take a two-handed mithril sword and grind it down to a slender blade. I know of a dwarf living north of Falador whose whetstone is unmatchable. It will be perfect for this task.
textByHashes.f4b72deaca8bca2a37559285fdcf3a88eaa22714: Once the blade is flexible enough, you should then be able to string it with a normal bow string. That is all you need to do.
textByHashes.4d5351c0fb69f2342bf89aa6e5b2f68e5195c26e: Ah, well do come and see me if you change your mind.
textByHashes.d0ee18812f638a9047ca5937f7f35108c2a504fd: Hello again, adventurer. Have you brought the weapon for me?
textByHashes.5916a3d729738111c1b6a077b0488d3a503ab021: Remember, you need to take a two-handed mithril sword and grind it down to a slender blade. There is a dwarf living north of Falador whose whetstone will be perfect for this.
textByHashes.7e3af4a9ec29b001af57a5627b1794942c6f2dc8: Excellent! Your help won't be forgotten.
textByHashes.31e76b40fd3d5184002853a62f8dbc366648eb6c: Now, I think it's high time for me to make my return to Entrana. There is a special ceremony taking place soon, and to miss it would fill me with regret.
textByHashes.093db894f7b3e8cce9011449561a0a2e2060ba24: On that note, there might be something else you can help me with...
textByHashes.a7c23974a5fb205cdeafe6d7e5f7f0199df22930: I have a special gift I wish to present at the ceremony. It's one that I know my fellow monks will appreciate. As such, it feels only right that a special gift is delivered in a special way.
textByHashes.8182d62c22132751e2efcd0da66d3cee508227d0: I would like my companions to enter the ceremony with no knowledge of the gift. It will then make for a joyous surprise for them. However, to do that, it must be smuggled onto the island.
textByHashes.e009ad41290b196f053a1128b6ad9c098f08662c: I confess, to do so would not quite be in keeping with our rules, but for such a wonderful gift, the opportunity can't be disregarded.
textByHashes.707d627a9e1b9fcf861c4f303aa863573893a197: Our island is home to the Runic Altar of Law. Recently, I have heard whispers of a way to access these altars via another realm.
textByHashes.f3719376249d367225a713481441170f988760a1: Excellent! In that case, please take this orb and journey through this 'Abyss' to the island of Entrana. Please do keep the orb safe though, for it is highly delicate.
textByHashes.eb97a01817c56bd2ba31c8b48c56ae93dd328562: The same voices that whispered of this 'Abyss' also spoke of pouches used to store runes. I'm sure a large one of those would be suitable.
textByHashes.b0a2645963e16b5d81bd72e6208add389c19c6a6: Wonderful! Here is the orb. Once you arrive, just place it on the altar in Entrana's church.
textByHashes.2187b0a58baa616d8b019e3f99ff6e14cf79a2e1: Hello again. You need to hurry or you'll miss the ceremony.
textByHashes.d5c65059ee89dc96002ed67264e6a772fcb21914: Use this 'Abyss' you spoke of to travel to the Runic Altar of Law. When doing so, make sure to put the orb in a large rune pouch to keep it safe.
textByHashes.cf972df82fc8f4953025fdd95626a97ee1be0158: Once you arrive, just place the orb on the altar in Entrana's church.
textByHashes.8512d77efa4e8d4858d6fa7ef27fce402a89f2b9: You're very lucky that I found it. Please be more careful with it this time.
textByHashes.a6dcbb9a47b0270db94bece41cd0a6b99d2f5fad: Oh ho! Another one! I don't think they exist, but you'd probably ask the head monk about it. If anyone would know, he would!
textByHashes.2b83947bf5a5ab4efaf61401201b87ffc1b5005d: Anything else you wanted to know?
textByHashes.f526758a3e8dffe003a2bc8bedcc599c94e99dc1: None of your business. Get lost.
textByHashes.73b2acc3fd5a542469daad9a7a5df03e0d12e95d: No, we've looked for ages but haven't... Hey! Wait a minute! How did you know about that?
textByHashes.d4a13d1fb0bbc9cf3c476187528830c5fef905c8: ...You tricked me. I'm not talking to you anymore.
textByHashes.81605ec3d05ee289bca862ac7f28c7cae707c768: I already told you. I'm not talking to you anymore.
textByHashes.06cf87953906147f6f31ad937d5f521b42c09c66: Excuse me...oh, wait, I thought you were someone else.
textByHashes.d43f691791a811c67d3bb1c9096c4d05fafb4796: Honestly, they are with us, and they aren't zombies.
textByHashes.3b177630febf8ed918c97bd33e6c87992147f527: I suppose I should view this as a test of faith...
textByHashes.4e3b59ec0f1ea5ba2415b8744275aa4c06b8f29c: Except the holy texts are light on plagues of zombie pirates.
textByHashes.8e845aea99484fbe6beb6c886c1dbbf15a7dcb25: Zombies! What ever will we do?
textByHashes.7029a16c1d121de898ca30bff13dab6ab813cd81: I knew I should have been a bricklayer...
textByHashes.fde11fd52b98ff662263e7fe53955f32a93f0f33: I don't want to lose my brain!
textByHashes.1ee86f0b28bb9d471a7213d7e9c91947186f4f0b: I was almost all the way through translating that book too...
textByHashes.7d5506129ccf0a0e8a20f47ecc951af1f50cd04d: What if they get in while I'm asleep? Oh no!
textByHashes.6f763819ba817779dca60c574625c37cb7475899: So, have you dealt with this sort of problem before?
textByHashes.30778d972a8cc488750ca92ebd7de54ab3973a3c: Would you like to receive a blessing?
textByHashes.068ff9470fb42bfd43556f147d50debea6be0057: Well...ow...at least...oof...I'm back in the right body...
textByHashes.47ab8026c83c52d1788a88cb5c49b3599e96823b: Ow, ow...those staples sting a little...
textByHashes.f7f408e3dac53f00a6f49e444dd0f0025963bbea: This is the worst hangover ever...and I didn't even get drunk!
textByHashes.bd58a74cf04b608feffbfb1fecefb332cf1219a1: Excuse me... Oh, wait, I thought you were someone else.
textByHashes.fb383b991e0a9595788ee902a70b4b4f0084075e: I knew you would save us! Bless you, my child!
textByHashes.63da35b64c457f7c10b761363b228cab2bab47ca: May Saradomin's light shine upon you!
textByHashes.bbaab70cd0f7a5ac02acd3870805e9dcc398bc9c: Saradomin smile upon you! You've saved us all!
textByHashes.6b3e61b3c4ad2a1999c014616b5fc61df35d371a: Your name will forever be listed amongst the virtuous!
textByHashes.08630f44e4b42a92610e6b6b8457d6596fd81e18: We like it that way actually! We get disturbed less. We still get rather a large amount of travellers looking for sanctuary and healing here as it is!
textByHashes.c58497b3e96530742a1f5030ce87ade38fb75822: You'll need to talk to Abbot Langley about that. He's usually to be found walking the halls of the monastery.
textByHashes.cc214f56df804cbc5b32ee20978dabda9a008029: Only members of our order can go up there. You'll need to talk to Abbot Langley if you want to explore the monastery further.
textByHashes.ecc8c43fb403ba251322ffdfb9409b562a8940fb: We offer sanctuary to those seeking the guidance of Saradomin.
textByHashes.c6a01a14b0152bd1c07dd8c6eed338ae3d4114fa: If Saradomin's not good enough for you, those otherworldly freaks from Arceuus are probably your kind of people.
textByHashes.772772d4f493ca40dfcef12566dc25df0331ae65: They're always looking for hidden knowledge about souls and spirits, when any sensible person would just trust in Saradomin.
